GeometryServiceBase.cc
1 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/Impl/GeometryServiceBase.h"

4  */
5 
6 #include <arcane/IMesh.h>
7 using namespace Arcane;
8 
9 #include <arcane/IItemOperationByBasicType.h>
10 #include <arcane/IItemFamily.h>
11 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
12 #include <arcane/ItemVectorView.h>
13 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
14 #include <arcane/VariableBuildInfo.h>
15 #include <arcane/SharedVariable.h>
16 
17 Integer GeometryServiceBase::s_suffix_count = 0;
18 
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 
22 GeometryServiceBase::
23 GeometryServiceBase()
24 {
25  m_changed_property = true; // par defaut pour induire directement une erreur si update non appel?
26  m_policy_tolerance = eUndef;
27  m_policy = NULL ;
28  m_first_update = true;
29 }
30 
31 GeometryServiceBase::
32 ~GeometryServiceBase()
33 {
34  ;
35 }
36 
37 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
38 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 
40 void
41 GeometryServiceBase::
42 addItemGroupProperty(ItemGroup group, Integer property, Integer storage)
43 {
44  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
45 
46  if (group.null())
47  traceMng()->fatal() << "Cannot add geometry property on an empty group";
48 
49  m_changed_property = true;
50  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & properties = m_group_property_map[group.internal()];
51  properties.defined |= property;
52  Integer current_property = 1;
53  while (property) {
54  if (property & current_property) {
55  properties.storages[static_cast<IGeometryProperty::eProperty>(current_property)].storageType |= storage;
56  traceMng()->debug() << "Add geometric property [" << IGeometryProperty::name(static_cast<IGeometryProperty::eProperty>(current_property)) << "] on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name();
57  }
58  property &= ~current_property;
59  current_property <<= 1;
60  }
61 }
62 
63 void
64 GeometryServiceBase::
65 addItemGroupProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property, RealVariable var)
66 {
67  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
68 
69  if (group.null())
70  traceMng()->fatal() << "Cannot add geometry property on an empty group";
71 
72  m_changed_property = true;
73  ARCANE_ASSERT((IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property)),("Scalar property expected"));
74  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & properties = m_group_property_map[group.internal()];
75  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = properties.storages[property];
76  if (storage.realVar) {
77  if (storage.realVar->name() != var.name())
78  traceMng()->fatal() << "Geometric property [" << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << "] storage already defined on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " with variable " << storage.realVar->name();
79  ARCANE_ASSERT((properties.defined & property),("Unconsistent state with undefined property with defined variable"));
80  return;
81  }
82  traceMng()->debug() << "Add geometric property [" << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << "] on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name();
83  properties.defined |= property;
84  storage.realVar.reset(new RealVariable(var));
85  storage.storageType |= IGeometryProperty::PVariable;
86  storage.externStorage |= IGeometryProperty::PVariable;
87 }
88 
89 void
90 GeometryServiceBase::
91 addItemGroupProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property, Real3Variable var)
92 {
93  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
94 
95  if (group.null())
96  traceMng()->fatal() << "Cannot add geometry property on an empty group";
97 
98  m_changed_property = true;
99  ARCANE_ASSERT((IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property)),("Vectorial property expected"));
100  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & properties = m_group_property_map[group.internal()];
101  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = properties.storages[property];
102  if (storage.real3Var) {
103  if (storage.real3Var->name() != var.name())
104  traceMng()->fatal() << "Geometric property [" << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << "] storage already defined on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " with variable " << storage.real3Var->name();
105  ARCANE_ASSERT((properties.defined & property),("Unconsistent state with undefined property with defined variable"));
106  return;
107  }
108  traceMng()->debug() << "Add geometric property [" << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << "] on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name();
109  properties.defined |= property;
110  storage.real3Var.reset(new Real3Variable(var));
111  storage.storageType |= IGeometryProperty::PVariable;
112  storage.externStorage |= IGeometryProperty::PVariable;
113 }
114 
115 Integer
116 GeometryServiceBase::
117 getItemGroupProperty(ItemGroup group)
118 {
119  PropertyMap::const_iterator iprop = m_group_property_map.find(group.internal());
120  if (iprop == m_group_property_map.end()) return IGeometryProperty::PNone;
121  return iprop->second.defined;
122 }
123 
124 bool
125 GeometryServiceBase::
126 hasItemGroupProperty(ItemGroup group, Integer property)
127 {
128  return (getItemGroupProperty(group) & property) == property;
129 }
130 
131 Integer
132 GeometryServiceBase::
133 getItemGroupPropertyStorage(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)
134 {
135  PropertyMap::const_iterator iprop = m_group_property_map.find(group.internal());
136  if (iprop == m_group_property_map.end()) return IGeometryProperty::PNoStorage;
137  return iprop->second.getStorage(property);
138 }
139 
140 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
141 
142 const IGeometryMng::RealVariable &
143 GeometryServiceBase::
144 getRealVariableProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)
145 {
146  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
147  if (m_policy_tolerance == eUndef)
148  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called without defined policy tolerance";
149  if (m_changed_property) {
150  if (m_policy_tolerance == eLazy)
151  traceMng()->info() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
152  else
153  traceMng()->fatal() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
154  }
155 
156  if (not IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property))
157  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non scalar property requested by scalar interface";
158  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = _checkItemGroupProperty(group.internal(),property,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
159  std::shared_ptr<RealVariable> & pvar = storage.realVar;
160  if (not pvar)
161  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Unexpected missing scalar field");
162  storage.usageVarCount++;
163  return *pvar;
164 }
165 
166 const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable &
167 GeometryServiceBase::
168 getReal3VariableProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)
169 {
170  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
171  if (m_policy_tolerance == eUndef)
172  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called without defined policy tolerance";
173  if (m_changed_property) {
174  if (m_policy_tolerance == eLazy)
175  traceMng()->info() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
176  else
177  traceMng()->fatal() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
178  }
179 
180  if (not IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property))
181  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non vectorial property requested by vectorial interface";
182  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = _checkItemGroupProperty(group.internal(),property,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
183  std::shared_ptr<Real3Variable> & pvar = storage.real3Var;
184  if (not pvar)
185  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Unexpected missing vectorial field");
186  storage.usageVarCount++;
187  return *pvar;
188 }
189 
190 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
191 
192 const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap &
193 GeometryServiceBase::
194 getRealGroupMapProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)
195 {
196  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
197  if (m_policy_tolerance == eUndef)
198  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called without defined policy tolerance";
199  if (m_changed_property) {
200  if (m_policy_tolerance == eLazy) {
201  traceMng()->info() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
202  } else {
203  traceMng()->fatal() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
204  }
205  }
206 
207  if (not IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property))
208  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non scalar property requested by scalar interface";
209  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = _checkItemGroupProperty(group.internal(),property,IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap);
210  std::shared_ptr<RealGroupMap> & pmap = storage.realMap;
211  if (not pmap)
212  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Unexpected missing scalar field");
213  storage.usageMapCount++;
214  return *pmap;
215 }
216 
217 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
218 
219 const IGeometryMng::Real3GroupMap &
220 GeometryServiceBase::
221 getReal3GroupMapProperty(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property)
222 {
223  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
224  if (m_policy_tolerance == eUndef)
225  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called without defined policy tolerance";
226  if (m_changed_property) {
227  if (m_policy_tolerance == eLazy)
228  traceMng()->info() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
229  else
230  traceMng()->fatal() << "Property requested without validation with update()";
231  }
232 
233  if (not IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property))
234  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non vectorial property requested by vectorial interface";
235  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = _checkItemGroupProperty(group.internal(),property,IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap);
236  std::shared_ptr<Real3GroupMap> & pmap = storage.real3Map;
237  if (not pmap)
238  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Unexpected missing vectorial field");
239  storage.usageMapCount++;
240  return *pmap;
241 }
242 
243 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
244 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
245 
246 void
247 GeometryServiceBase::
248 update(IGeometryPolicy * policy)
249 {
250  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
251  if (m_policy_tolerance == eUndef)
252  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called without defined policy tolerance";
253  if (policy == NULL)
254  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called with illegal policy";
255 
256  beginContext(policy);
257 
258  typedef Collection<IMesh *> MeshCollection;
259  MeshCollection all_meshes = List<IMesh*>();
260 
261  // Ajout d'abord des top level meshes (ie sans parent)
262  for(PropertyMap::iterator igroup = m_group_property_map.begin(); igroup != m_group_property_map.end(); ++igroup)
263  {
264  ItemGroupImpl * group = igroup->first;
265  IMesh * mesh = group->mesh();
266  if (mesh->parentMesh() == NULL) // top level mesh
267  if (not all_meshes.contains(mesh))
268  all_meshes.add(mesh);
269  }
270 
271  for(PropertyMap::iterator igroup = m_group_property_map.begin(); igroup != m_group_property_map.end(); ++igroup)
272  {
273  ItemGroupImpl * group = igroup->first;
274  IMesh * mesh = group->mesh();
275  if (not all_meshes.contains(mesh))
276  all_meshes.add(mesh);
277  }
278 
279  for(MeshCollection::Enumerator imesh = all_meshes.enumerator(); ++imesh; )
280  {
281  _fullUpdate(*imesh);
282  }
283 
284  m_changed_property = false;
285  endContext();
286 
287  m_first_update = false;
288 }
289 
290 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
291 
292 void
293 GeometryServiceBase::
294 update(IMesh * mesh, IGeometryPolicy * policy)
295 {
296  Trace::Setter setter(traceMng(),className());
297  if (m_policy_tolerance == eUndef)
298  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called without defined policy tolerance";
299  if (policy == NULL) {
300  if (m_policy_tolerance == eLazy)
301  traceMng()->warning() << "IGeometryMng::update called with null policy : disables optimizations";
302  else
303  traceMng()->fatal() << "IGeometryMng::update called with illegal policy";
304  }
305 
306  beginContext(policy);
307 
308  _partialUpdate(mesh);
309 
310  m_changed_property = false;
311  endContext();
312 
313  m_first_update = false;
314 }
315 
316 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
317 
318 void
319 GeometryServiceBase::
320 setSuffix(const String & suffix)
321 {
322  if (suffix.null())
323  {
324  m_suffix = String("By")+(unsigned long)(s_suffix_count++);
325  mesh()->parallelMng()->broadcastString(m_suffix, 0);
326  }
327  else
328  {
329  m_suffix = suffix;
330  }
331 }
332 
333 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
334 
335 void
336 GeometryServiceBase::
337 _fullUpdate(IMesh * mesh)
338 {
339  /* L'algo actuel factorise les calculs avec allItems et entre sous-maillage et parent
340  * Si allItems est requis alors les sous-groupes sont delegues (ie reutilisent les calculs de allItems)
341  * Le traitement est aussi fait dans l'ordre Face puis Cell pour factoriser les calculs
342  * (ex: centre des faces pour etoilement des volumes)
343  */
344 
345  traceMng()->debug() << "Full update on " << mesh->name();
346 
347  const eItemKind all_kinds[] = { IK_Face, IK_Cell };
348  const Integer all_kind_size = sizeof(all_kinds) / sizeof(eItemKind);
349 
350  // Traite par maillage la mise a jour des groupes
351  for(Integer ikind=0;ikind<all_kind_size;++ikind) {
352  const eItemKind current_kind = all_kinds[ikind];
353  IItemFamily * family = mesh->itemFamily(current_kind);
354  ItemGroup allItemGroup = family->allItems();
355 
356  PropertyMap::iterator finder = m_group_property_map.find(allItemGroup.internal());
357  if (finder != m_group_property_map.end())
358  {
359  // Delegate all geometric properties already planned for allItems
360  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & all_group_property = finder->second;
361  update(allItemGroup);
362 
363  for(PropertyMap::iterator igroup = m_group_property_map.begin(); igroup != m_group_property_map.end(); ++igroup)
364  {
365  ItemGroup group(igroup->first);
366  // Ne traite que les groupes du maillage courant de bon genre (sinon le heritage du calcul n'est pas possible)
367  // on traduit cela sur les familles
368  const bool isSameFamily = (family == group.itemFamily());
369  const bool isSubFamily = (family == group.itemFamily()->parentFamily());
370  const bool isSameKind = (family->itemKind() == group.itemKind());
371  if (isSameFamily || isSubFamily)
372  {
373  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & group_property = igroup->second;
374  for(ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfos::iterator iprop = group_property.storages.begin();
375  iprop != group_property.storages.end(); ++iprop)
376  {
377  const IGeometryProperty::eProperty property = iprop->first;
378  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = iprop->second;
379 
380  // propriete commune avec allItemGroup qui passe la dimension
381  if (property & all_group_property.defined && (isSameKind || IGeometryProperty::isKindIndependent(property)))
382  {
383  if (checkNeedUpdate(group,property,storage))
384  {
385  // Is a scalar property
386  if (IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property))
387  {
388  copyAllItemsPropertyStorage<Real>(property,allItemGroup,all_group_property.storages[property], group, storage);
389  }
390  else
391  {
392  ARCANE_ASSERT((IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property)),("Vectorial property expected"));
393  copyAllItemsPropertyStorage<Real3>(property,allItemGroup,all_group_property.storages[property], group, storage);
394  }
395  setNewContext(storage);
396  }
397  else
398  {
399  if (group.isAllItems())
400  traceMng()->debug(Trace::High) << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " is up-to-date";
401  else
402  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " is up-to-date";
403  }
404  }
405  }
406  }
407  }
408  }
409  }
410 
411  // Mise a jour des autres proprietes (on repasse sur celles deja calculees mais on n'y fait rien)
412  for(PropertyMap::iterator iprop = m_group_property_map.begin(); iprop != m_group_property_map.end(); ++iprop)
413  {
414  if (iprop->first->mesh() == mesh)
415  update(iprop->first);
416  }
417 }
418 
419 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
420 
421 void
422 GeometryServiceBase::
423 _partialUpdate(IMesh * mesh)
424 {
425  /* L'algo actuel factorise les calculs avec allItems et le maillage est son parent eventuel
426  * Si allItems est requis alors les sous-groupes sont delegues (ie reutilisent les calculs de allItems)
427  * Le traitement est aussi fait dans l'ordre Face puis Cell pour factoriser les calculs
428  * (ex: centre des faces pour etoilement des volumes)
429  */
430 
431  traceMng()->debug() << "Partial update on " << mesh->name();
432 
433  const eItemKind all_kinds[] = { IK_Face, IK_Cell };
434  const Integer all_kind_size = sizeof(all_kinds) / sizeof(eItemKind);
435 
436  // Traite par maillage la mise a jour des groupes
437  for(Integer ikind=0;ikind<all_kind_size;++ikind) {
438  const eItemKind current_kind = all_kinds[ikind];
439  IItemFamily * family = mesh->itemFamily(current_kind);
440  IItemFamily * parent_family = family->parentFamily();
441 
442  // 1- On privilegie les calculs par heritage
443  if (parent_family)
444  {
445  ItemGroup parentAllItemGroup = parent_family->allItems();
446  PropertyMap::iterator finder = m_group_property_map.find(parentAllItemGroup.internal());
447  if (finder != m_group_property_map.end())
448  {
449  // Delegate all geometric properties already done for parent allItems
450  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & all_group_property = finder->second;
451 
452  for(PropertyMap::iterator igroup = m_group_property_map.begin(); igroup != m_group_property_map.end(); ++igroup)
453  {
454  ItemGroup group(igroup->first);
455  // Ne traite que les groupes du maillage courant de bon genre
456  // on traduit cela sur les familles
457  const bool isSameFamily = (family == group.itemFamily());
458  const bool isSameKind = (parent_family->itemKind() == group.itemKind());
459  if (isSameFamily)
460  {
461  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & group_property = igroup->second;
462  for(ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfos::iterator iprop = group_property.storages.begin();
463  iprop != group_property.storages.end(); ++iprop)
464  {
465  const IGeometryProperty::eProperty property = iprop->first;
466  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = iprop->second;
467 
468  // propriete commune avec allItemGroup qui passe la dimension
469  if (property & all_group_property.defined && (isSameKind || IGeometryProperty::isKindIndependent(property)))
470  {
471  // Si besoin de mise a jour et que parent a jour
472  if (checkNeedUpdate(group,property,storage) && !checkNeedUpdate(parentAllItemGroup,property,all_group_property.storages[property]))
473  {
474  // Is a scalar property
475  if (IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property))
476  {
477  copyAllItemsPropertyStorage<Real>(property,parentAllItemGroup,all_group_property.storages[property], group, storage);
478  }
479  else
480  {
481  ARCANE_ASSERT((IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property)),("Vectorial property expected"));
482  copyAllItemsPropertyStorage<Real3>(property,parentAllItemGroup,all_group_property.storages[property], group, storage);
483  }
484  setNewContext(storage);
485  }
486  else
487  {
488  if (group.isAllItems())
489  traceMng()->debug(Trace::High) << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " is up-to-date";
490  else
491  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " is up-to-date";
492  }
493  }
494  }
495  }
496  }
497  }
498  }
499 
500  // 2- Le complement via le groupe allItems
501  ItemGroup allItemGroup = family->allItems();
502  PropertyMap::iterator finder = m_group_property_map.find(allItemGroup.internal());
503  if (finder != m_group_property_map.end())
504  {
505  // Delegate all geometric properties already planned for allItems
506  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & all_group_property = finder->second;
507  update(allItemGroup);
508 
509  for(PropertyMap::iterator igroup = m_group_property_map.begin(); igroup != m_group_property_map.end(); ++igroup)
510  {
511  ItemGroup group(igroup->first);
512  // Ne traite que les groupes du maillage courant de bon genre (sinon le heritage du calcul n'est pas possible)
513  // on traduit cela sur les familles
514  const bool isSameFamily = (family == group.itemFamily());
515  if (isSameFamily)
516  {
517  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & group_property = igroup->second;
518  for(ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfos::iterator iprop = group_property.storages.begin();
519  iprop != group_property.storages.end(); ++iprop)
520  {
521  const IGeometryProperty::eProperty property = iprop->first;
522  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage = iprop->second;
523 
524  // propriete commune avec allItemGroup qui passe la dimension
525  if (property & all_group_property.defined)
526  {
527  if (checkNeedUpdate(group,property,storage))
528  {
529  // Is a scalar property
530  if (IGeometryProperty::isScalar(property))
531  {
532  copyAllItemsPropertyStorage<Real>(property,allItemGroup,all_group_property.storages[property], group, storage);
533  }
534  else
535  {
536  ARCANE_ASSERT((IGeometryProperty::isVectorial(property)),("Vectorial property expected"));
537  copyAllItemsPropertyStorage<Real3>(property,allItemGroup,all_group_property.storages[property], group, storage);
538  }
539  setNewContext(storage);
540  }
541  else
542  {
543  if (group.isAllItems())
544  traceMng()->debug(Trace::High) << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " is up-to-date";
545  else
546  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " is up-to-date";
547  }
548  }
549  }
550  }
551  }
552  }
553  }
554 
555  // 3- Mise a jour des autres proprietes (on repasse sur celles deja calculees mais on n'y fait rien)
556  for(PropertyMap::iterator iprop = m_group_property_map.begin(); iprop != m_group_property_map.end(); ++iprop)
557  {
558  if (iprop->first->mesh() == mesh)
559  update(iprop->first);
560  }
561 }
562 
563 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
564 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
565 
566 void
567 GeometryServiceBase::
568 reset()
569 {
570  for(PropertyMap::iterator iprop = m_group_property_map.begin(); iprop != m_group_property_map.end(); ++iprop)
571  {
572  reset(iprop->first);
573  }
574 }
575 
576 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
577 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
578 
579 void
580 GeometryServiceBase::
581 setPolicyTolerance(bool tolerance)
582 {
583  if (tolerance)
584  m_policy_tolerance = eLazy;
585  else
586  m_policy_tolerance = eStrict;
587 }
588 
589 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
590 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
591 
592 ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo &
593 GeometryServiceBase::_checkItemGroupProperty(ItemGroupImpl* group,
594  IGeometryProperty::eProperty property,
595  IGeometryProperty::eStorage storage)
596 {
597  PropertyMap::iterator iprop = m_group_property_map.find(group);
598  if (iprop == m_group_property_map.end())
599  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non declare group " << group->name() << " / " << group->mesh()->name();
600  ItemGroupGeometryProperty & properties = iprop->second;
601  if ((properties.defined & property) != property)
602  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non available property [" << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << "] requested from group " << group->name() << " / " << group->mesh()->name();
603  ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storages = properties.storages[property];
604  if ((storages.storageType & storage) != storage)
605  traceMng()->fatal() << "Non available storage [" << IGeometryProperty::name(storage) << "] requested for property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on group " << group->name() << " / " << group->mesh()->name();
606  return storages;
607 }
608 
609 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
610 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
611 
612 void
613 GeometryServiceBase::
614 beginContext(IGeometryPolicy * policy)
615 {
616  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_policy == NULL),("Geometry Context already begun"));
617  m_policy = policy;
618  m_policy->beginContext();
619 }
620 
621 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
622 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
623 
624 void
625 GeometryServiceBase::
626 endContext()
627 {
628  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_policy != NULL),("Geometry Context not yet begun"));
629  m_policy->endContext();
630  m_policy = NULL;
631 }
632 
633 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
634 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
635 
636 void
637 GeometryServiceBase::
638 _checkItemGroupPropertyUsage(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property, IGeometryProperty::eStorage storage,
639  UInt32 count, Integer externStorage, Integer storageType)
640 {
641  if ((externStorage & storage) == 0 && (storageType & storage) != 0)
642  {
643  if (count == 0 && not m_first_update)
644  traceMng()->warning() << "Geometric property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " with " << IGeometryProperty::name(storage) << " storage never used since last update";
645  traceMng()->debug(Trace::High) << "Geometric property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on group " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " with " << IGeometryProperty::name(storage) << " storage has been used " << count << " times since last update";
646  }
647 }
648 
649 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
650 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
651 
652 bool
653 GeometryServiceBase::
654 checkNeedUpdate(ItemGroup group, IGeometryProperty::eProperty property, const ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage_info)
655 {
656  Int64 context = m_policy->context();
657  if (context != -1) // -1 means undef
658  return (storage_info.context != context);
659  else
660  return true;
661 }
662 
663 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
664 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
665 
666 void
667 GeometryServiceBase::
668 setNewContext(ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & storage_info)
669 {
670  storage_info.context = m_policy->context();
671  storage_info.usageVarCount = 0;
672  storage_info.usageMapCount = 0;
673 }
674 
675 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
676 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
677 
678 template<typename T>
679 void
680 GeometryServiceBase::
681 copyAllItemsPropertyStorage(IGeometryProperty::eProperty property, ItemGroup allItemGroup, ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & src, ItemGroup group, ItemGroupGeometryProperty::StorageInfo & dest)
682 {
683  typedef typename ContainerAccessorT<T>::RealTVariable RealTVariable; // ItemVariableScalarRefT<T>
684  typedef typename ContainerAccessorT<T>::RealTGroupMap RealTGroupMap;
685 
686 //#ifdef __GNUG__
687 //#warning "BUG: fails when ItemGroupMap storage only on allItems group"
688 //#endif
689 
690  // Suppose que la propriete associe dans allItems existe en tant que variable
691  RealTVariable & var = *ContainerAccessorT<T>::getVarContainer(src);
692 
693  // Need Variable storage for that property ?
694  if (dest.storageType & IGeometryProperty::PVariable)
695  {
696  if (dest.externStorage & IGeometryProperty::PVariable)
697  {
698  RealTVariable & lvar = *ContainerAccessorT<T>::getVarContainer(dest);
699  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,group)
700  {
701  lvar[iitem] = var[iitem];
702  }
703  }
704  else
705  {
706  std::shared_ptr<RealTVariable> & lvar = ContainerAccessorT<T>::getVarContainer(dest);
707  if (lvar)
708  { // Comparaison des IVariables
709  if (lvar->variable() != var.variable())
710  {
711  if (lvar->variable()->itemFamily() == var.variable()->itemFamily())
712  {
713  // change reference to allItems container (dont need copy)
714  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " delegated from " << allItemGroup.name() << " / " << allItemGroup.mesh()->name();
715  lvar.reset(new RealTVariable(var));
716  }
717  else
718  {
719  // this is an other mesh variable (need transposed copy)
720  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " delegated from parent " << allItemGroup.name() << " / " << allItemGroup.mesh()->name();
721  SharedItemVariableScalarRefT<T> shared_var(group.itemFamily(), var);
722  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,group)
723  {
724  (*lvar)[iitem] = shared_var[iitem];
725  }
726  }
727  }
728  // else nothing to copy; already well referenced
729  }
730  else
731  {
732  if (group.itemFamily() == var.variable()->itemFamily())
733  {
734  // new reference on allItems container (dont need copy)
735  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " delegated from " << allItemGroup.name() << " / " << allItemGroup.mesh()->name();
736  lvar.reset(new RealTVariable(var));
737  }
738  else
739  {
740  // this is an other mesh variable (need transposed copy)
741  traceMng()->debug() << "Property " << IGeometryProperty::name(property) << " on " << group.name() << " / " << group.mesh()->name() << " delegated from parent " << allItemGroup.name() << " / " << allItemGroup.mesh()->name();
742  lvar = buildPropertyVariableT<T>(group,property);
743  SharedItemVariableScalarRefT<T> shared_var(group.itemFamily(), var);
744  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,group)
745  {
746  (*lvar)[iitem] = shared_var[iitem];
747  }
748  }
749  }
750  }
751  }
752 
753  // Need ItemGroupMap storage for that property ?
754  if (dest.storageType & IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap)
755  {
756  ARCANE_ASSERT(((dest.externStorage & IGeometryProperty::PItemGroupMap) == 0),("Unexpected extern ItemGroupMap storage"));
757  std::shared_ptr<RealTGroupMap> & lvar = ContainerAccessorT<T>::getMapContainer(dest);
758  if (not lvar)
759  {
760  lvar.reset(new RealTGroupMap(group));
761  traceMng()->debug() << "Building Map " << lvar->name();
762  }
763  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,group)
764  {
765  (*lvar)[iitem] = var[iitem];
766  }
767  }
768 }
769 
770 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
771 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
772 
773 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
774 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
ContainerAccessorT
Modéle générique (vide) des accčs de StorageInfo par type de stockage.
